About Growlity

Your Trusted Partner for
ESG & Sustainability Excellence

Growlity is a premier ESG consulting firm dedicated to guiding organizations toward sustainable, compliant, and profitable futures. We bridge the gap between complex regulatory requirements and practical business strategies.

Operating globally across India, USA, UK, Canada, Mexico, Thailand, and GCC countries, our multidisciplinary team empowers businesses to navigate sustainability frameworks, optimize supply chains, manage carbon footprints, and achieve recognized certifications.

10+
Years Exp.
7+
Global Regions
15+
Industries
GlobalTeam

Our Expertise

End-to-End ESG Advisory & Solutions

Comprehensive, tailored strategies to drive your organization's sustainability journey.

ESG Strategy & Advisory

Gap analysis, net-zero roadmaps & climate risk assessment.

Sustainability Reporting

BRSR, CSRD, ISSB, and IFRS frameworks compliance.

Carbon Accounting

Scope 1, 2 & 3 emissions calculation and decarbonization.

EU CBAM Advisory

Navigating EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism compliance.

Ratings & Disclosures

Improve EcoVadis, CDP, S&P, and Sustainalytics scores.

Life Cycle Assessment

Product carbon footprint (PCF) & environmental impact.

Digital Solutions

Next-Generation ESG Technology Platforms

Leveraging advanced technology to simplify complex ESG data management and global reporting.

ESGTech.ai

An AI-powered platform for precise calculation of Scope 1, 2, and 3 GHG emissions.

CBAMx

A specialized platform helping exporters navigate and comply with complex EU CBAM regulations.

BRSR India

A comprehensive knowledge hub providing templates, tools, and regulatory insights for the BRSR framework.

Cross-sector expertise bringing specialized insights to your unique industry challenges.

Our Methodology

Our Strategic 6-Step Methodology for ESG Success

1

1Consultation

Understanding your current baseline and goals.

2

2Assessment

Gap analysis and materiality assessment.

3

3Strategy Development

Creating a tailored ESG roadmap.

4

4Implementation

Executing initiatives and data collection.

5

5Reporting

Aligning with global disclosure frameworks.

6

6Continuous Improvement

Ongoing monitoring and optimization.

Client Stories

On the side of ambitious action

"

This recognition aligned and unified our ESG efforts globally. Thanks to Growlity, our governance and disclosures reached new heights.

Mr. Don Stover
Director of Corporate Quality
APackaging Group LLC — EcoVadis Platinum
"

Rated in the top 1%, this reflects our core belief: sustainability is central to business, not separate — it's how we create lasting impact.

Mr. Gyanesh Chaudhary
Chairman and Managing Director
Vikram Solar Group — EcoVadis Platinum
"

Receiving the EcoVadis Gold Medal is a proud milestone in our sustainability journey, reflecting our focused efforts to embed ESG at the core.

Chief Strategy and Sustainability Officer
Granules India — EcoVadis Gold
